question: Which of the following would most likely provide examples of mitotic cell divisions?
options: longitudinal section of a shoot tip
longitudinal section of a leaf vein
cross section of an anther (site of pollen production in a flower)
correct_answer: longitudinal section of a shoot tip
_smoke_note: Q01 CANARY -- known-good, 4/5 peers unanimous B in Trial_02_V060. Tests basic wiring: fleet dispatch + relay + answer extraction + ip_ledger write.

question: Typical advertising regulatory bodies suggest, for example that adverts must not: encourage _________, cause unnecessary ________ or _____, and must not cause _______ offence.
_smoke_note: Q02 ABSTAIN CASCADE -- 4/5 peers ABSTAINed in Trial_02_V060; single ULTRA peer returned D (wrong); cascade accepted D via single_peer_fallback. Correct answer is I. Post-M24-hotfix: Posse (round_up_sweep.mjs) should re-attack on completion. This Q does NOT test that validate-relay.mjs itself blocks single_peer_fallback (that requires Full M24 Marathon patch). It tests that the Round-Up sweep CLI detects source_id=70 in the miss-list and fires Posse against it.

question: A company discovers that a supplier has been using child labor in violation of the company's code of conduct. The most ethically appropriate immediate response is to:
options: Immediately terminate the supplier contract without notice
Publicly disclose the violation to customers and media
Engage the supplier privately to remediate and set a compliance deadline
Report the violation to local government authorities immediately
Suspend orders and conduct an independent audit before deciding
Do nothing until the next contract renewal
Increase order volume to give the supplier resources to fix the problem
Transfer the contract to a competitor supplier immediately
correct_answer: Suspend orders and conduct an independent audit before deciding
_smoke_note: Q03 ANDON CANARY -- chosen for high inter-peer disagreement on ethics/process tradeoffs. Pass criteria: variance > 15% triggers Andon star-chamber escalation when --andon-escalate=star-chamber is active.
